cases.behavior: A response proposed from summary A cannot target the source thread of summary B
Confirmation from the proposal interaction or an earlier interaction is rejected
Concurrent confirmation replay produces at most one dispatch transition
Leading and trailing whitespace, Unicode, and line endings are preserved exactly
Empty, whitespace-only, NUL-containing, and oversized response bodies are rejected
Duplicate completion events are ignored and unique contexts retain deterministic order
Identical request replay returns the original result and conflicting replay is rejected
Malformed, truncated, oversized, unknown-version, and trailing input fails closed
A duplicate realtime function call ID cannot repeat a state transition or write
Loss of authoritative acknowledgement after dispatch produces outcome_unknown
Restart recovery cannot convert pending or unknown metadata into a fresh write
Production start, console, broker, realtime, tools, secrets, and Paseo behavior execute from Rust
